scope: Public records associated with the single Amazilia amazilia flight recorded at Tama Zoological Park on 2012-11-10

subjectIdentityEvidence.location: Tama Zoological Park greenhouse, Tokyo, Japan
subjectIdentityEvidence.sameIndividualAssertion: authors believed the same individual always came to the same feeder

publicEvidence.rightWingSurfaceAndMotion: available for one selected wingbeat as 17 reconstructed phases
publicEvidence.leftWingEvidence: left wingtip tracked at four phases for global-axis construction; no deposited left-wing surface or track coordinates
publicEvidence.bodyAndTailEvidence: visible in public camera videos but no deposited calibrated surface, outline tracks, or body-COM registration
publicEvidence.cameraEvidence: four synchronized 2000 fps videos are public as 8-bit AVI exports; original 12-bit MRAW, calibration matrices/images, and 2D tracks are not deposited
publicEvidence.atmosphericEvidence: approximate greenhouse temperature only; pressure, humidity, density, and viscosity are not reported
publicEvidence.massAndInertiaEvidence: no same-individual body mass, whole-bird inertia, or bilateral wing mass properties are deposited

schema2Disposition.uniqueSource: original authors or Tama Zoological Park animal record

schema2Disposition.field: geometry complete body and tail surface
schema2Disposition.uniqueSource: unpublished calibrated images/tracks or a new same-specimen reconstruction
unpublished left-wing tracks or calibrated raw images
same-individual veterinary measurement, preserved specimen, or author-qualified measurement

schema2Disposition.field: prescribedWingDynamics left and right mass, COM, inertia
physical wing thickness and distributed twist inertia
schema2Disposition.uniqueSource: same-individual feather/wing measurement and a distributed-mass model

firstContact.name: Hao Liu
firstContact.currentInstitutionEvidence: Chiba University Graduate School of Engineering and Center for Aerial Intelligent Vehicles

acquisitionPath.initialReplyBurden: yes/no/unknown checklist; no file transfer required
authorOrZooRecordsCanPotentiallyUnblock: body mass near the recording date
camera calibration and raw synchronized frames
body, wing-base, left-wing, and tail tracks
likelyRequiresNewMeasurementIfAbsent: whole-bird center of mass and principal inertia
bilateral wing mass, center of mass, and inertia
physical wing thickness or feather mass distribution

decision.nextAction: send the availability checklist to the corresponding author; if same-individual inertial records do not exist, design a new specimen-complete measurement campaign
decision.antiFabricationRule: species averages, another zoo bird, or another study specimen must be labeled hybrid sensitivity input and cannot close this audit
